summary: Frontend-only validation of Seller OS Conversations UI (/dashboard/seller-os/conversations). All 8 review checks passed. Seeded 1 mission + 1 outreached lead + 5 outreach events (sent/delivered/opened/clicked/sent+artifact) + 1 PDF artifact via direct Mongo insert; rendered correctly with the new EVENT_TONE map (clicked=violet-300, opened=amber-300, sent/delivered=blue-300). Send offer + Send+audit buttons are now ENABLED for stage='outreached' (previous iteration_10 HIGH bug is FIXED via the Conversations.jsx allow-list `['qualified','discovered','outreached','interested'].includes(active.stage)` on line 144). Artifact link renders with correct href `${API}/seller-offers/{artifact_id}/download.pdf`, target=_blank. PDF endpoint verified separately via curl GET → 200, content-type application/pdf, 15215 bytes, valid %PDF-1.4 magic. Cleaned up all TEST_ seed rows after the run.

minor.issue: HEAD method returns 405 (Allow: GET only). The review request asked for a HEAD validation; switched to GET which returns 200 + application/pdf correctly. Not a real bug, just a doc/test-flow note — browsers always GET when target=_blank link is clicked.

issues: 'Made with Emergent' badge overlaps a tiny notification dot in the lower-right corner — purely cosmetic, present app-wide.

action_items: (Doc only) Review request used route path `/dashboard/seller/conversations`; actual route in App.js (line 129) is `/dashboard/seller-os/conversations`. Update task templates / docs to avoid future testing-agent confusion.
(Optional) Add a HEAD handler on /api/seller-offers/{artifact_id}/download.pdf for cheap link liveness checks (currently returns 405).
critical_code_review_comments: Conversations.jsx is now a clean 202-line standalone file (was previously bundled inside the 711-line SellerLifecycle.jsx per iteration_10) — file-size guideline (>700 lines) addressed by the split.
Conversations.jsx line 144 disabled gate `['qualified','discovered','outreached','interested'].includes(active.stage)` correctly matches backend allow-list in seller_outreach.py line 258 — no drift.

Anchor tag rendering (line 179) now uses a real <a href ... target=_blank rel=noopener> so middle-click / right-click 'open link in new tab' / copy-link works — addresses the openArtifact() critique from iteration_10.
EVENT_TONE map in _shared.js (line 8) now includes 'clicked' → text-violet-300; visually confirmed rendering on the clicked event tile.

Minor: load() effect (line 40) refetches on missionId change, but the early-return on line 28 when initially setting missionId means the FIRST mission load fires a second render — harmless but could be simplified to a single fetch chain.
test_credentials: Session token test_session_1779636592168 (user_test1779636592168, is_admin=true). Cookie + Bearer both accepted by /api/auth/me.
seed_data_creation: Seeded then CLEANED UP: mission TEST_mission_conv_1780112888705 + lead TEST_lead_conv_1780112888705 (stage=outreached) + artifact TEST_artifact_conv_1780112888705 + 5 seller_outreach_events (sent, delivered, opened, clicked, sent+artifact_id). All deleted at end of run (missions=1 leads=1 artifacts=1 events=5).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Conversations UI is at /dashboard/seller-os/conversations (NOT /seller/). EVENT_TONE colors confirmed: sent=blue, delivered=blue, opened=amber, clicked=violet, replied/interested=emerald, bounced/unsubscribed=rose, not_interested=zinc. Buttons (conv-send-offer, conv-send-offer-artifact) enabled for stage in {qualified, discovered, outreached, interested}. PDF download is application/pdf (binary), not download.html anymore — Playwright PDF rendering pipeline is live. To re-seed for visual validation, insert a seller_acquisition mission + seller_lead(stage='outreached') + at least one seller_outreach_events row; the threads endpoint filters to {outreached, interested} stages only.
rca of the issue: n/a — no bugs reproduced. Iteration_10 HIGH gate bug is fixed in current Conversations.jsx (line 144).
